# Kraken UI Kit (JIT DS 2.0)

> A shadcn-based design system with a 3-layer --ds-* token architecture
> (global → semantic → component) and free brand theming (jit / brand) via
> [data-theme]. 56 tokenized components, Figma-first, machine-readable:
> every component has a dense JSON contract generated from human-maintained
> sources. Read foundations first; never guess variant names or tokens.

## Machine-readable layer (start here)

- [foundations.json](manifests/foundations.json): always-on rules — token architecture, brands, conventions, shadcn divergences, scales, install. Read once per session.
- [Manifest index](manifests/index.json): all components with aliases/keywords for lookup.
- Per-component contracts: `manifests/components/<name>.json` (e.g. [button](manifests/components/button.json)) — install command, exact variant enums + defaults, props, slots, --ds-* tokens, a11y, usage do/don't.
- [tokens.json](manifests/tokens.json): compact token index with brand-mode values.
- MCP server (preferred when available): `claude mcp add kraken-ui -- npx -y @kraken-ui/mcp` — tools: list_components, search_components, get_component, get_foundations, get_tokens, get_usage_rules.

## Install

- Configure the registry once in your `components.json`: `"registries": { "@kraken": "https://ziolkowskiw.github.io/kraken-ui-kit/r/{name}.json" }`.
- [Registry](registry.json): shadcn registry, namespace @kraken — then `npx shadcn add @kraken/<name>`; the `ai-foundations` item installs foundations.json into your repo.

## Human docs

- [README.md](README.md): what the kit is and how it fits together.
- [MAPPING.md](MAPPING.md): Figma node ID ↔ component file ↔ prop tables, conventions, shadcn divergence contract.
- [design.md](design.md): the design-system rules (tokens, brands, component building).
- [Component docs](docs/components/): generated per-component markdown.
